snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #590 - Marko i Hambi
snippet.description:
https://www.facebook.com/XiaomiHrvatska

Tlo se nakon razornog potresa u sredi≈°njoj Hrvatskoj zatreslo vi≈°e od 1000 puta.
Svako novo podrhtavanje tla donosi novi nemir, a sliƒçan efekt u ovim napetim vremenima mo≈æe izazvati i vibracija mobitela.
Zato ugasi vibru i preuzmi Smirilicu, umirujuƒáu melodiju zvona nastalu smirivanjem vibracija samog potresa.
Smiri sebe i okolinu, preuzmi Smirilicu i doniraj za potresom pogoƒëena podruƒçja, a vi≈°e saznaj ovdje: https://www.cinipravustvar.hr/smirilica 

Na crveni kauƒç sti≈æe jedan od najpopularnijih gostiju u Podcast Inkubatoru - poznati boksaƒçki i MMA trener, ali i legenda na≈°ih dru≈°tvenih mre≈æa, Goran Babiƒá - Hamby. On i Petrak ƒáe analizirati sve aktualno na borilaƒçkoj sceni, te ƒáe ekskluzivno najaviti i novi projekt koji bi od 1.5. trebao krenuti na kanalu Podcast Inkubatora

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
Aran≈æman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic‚Äã‚Äã

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Kido

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:

Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: Mladen ima 32 registrirana old timera 4K
snippet.description:
Mladen Cvitanoviƒá iz Golubinje kod ≈Ωepƒça poznat je po tome ≈°to je prvi Bosanac koji je kupio vlak i vagone kako bi napravio turistiƒçku atrakciju. Lokomotiva i vagoni su u ispravnom stanju. Meƒëutim on je pravi Kralj old timera jer u svojoj kolekciji ima 32 registrirana old timera. Imao je u svojoj kolekciji i Cadillac Elvisa Presleya ali ga je mijenjao za Renault Primaquatre iz 1936. godine. To je kako Mladen tvrdi jedini automobil na svijetu koji je  registriran i nalazi se u njegovoj kolekciji. Mladen pored old timera kupuje i kuƒáe, zemlji≈°ta,  ≈°ume.. Tako je u svome mjestu kupio cijelo selo.  Ljudi su odlazili u svijet a Mladen je kupovao njihove kuƒáe i imanja. Danas sadi voƒáe, uzgaja ovce, koko≈°i. Zanimljivo je napomenuti da Mladen ima polo≈æen ispit za pilota. Vozio je avione i helikoptere ali nikada nije vozio traktor. en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen Cvitanoviƒá from Golubinja near ≈Ωepƒçe is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Just like an 'I Love You'

that's never heard

You're long gone

Don't circle the track

and leave your skin on the floor.

Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

Praviƒçan, patriota pomalo preke naravi re≈°avao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anƒëeo ƒçuvar dok je za ove druge bio noƒána mora, a gnev i jaƒçinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odliƒçno pamtili. ≈Ωivotni put Ljubomira Maga≈°a i dru≈æine koju je okupio oko sebe, mo≈æe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. -----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovie‚Äã
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/‚Äã
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/‚Äã
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy,‚Äù from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.‚Äôs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as you‚Äôve never seen them before.  It‚Äôs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBron‚Äôs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even ‚ÄúKing‚Äù James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the ‚ÄúAvengers‚Äù films, ‚ÄúHotel Rwanda‚Äù), Khris Davis (‚ÄúJudas and the Black Messiah,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúAtlanta‚Äù), Sonequa Martin-Green (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Walking Dead,‚Äù ‚ÄúStar Trek: Discovery‚Äù), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚Äù), Eric Bauza (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚Äù), and Zendaya (upcoming ‚ÄúDune,‚Äù ‚ÄúMalcolm & Marie‚Äù).

Lee (‚ÄúGirls Trip,‚Äù ‚ÄúNight School‚Äù) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The film‚Äôs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Homecoming‚Äù), animation producer Troy Nethercott (‚ÄúWonder Park‚Äù), production designers Kevin Ishioka (‚ÄúThe Mule‚Äù), Akin McKenzie (Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhen They See Us‚Äù) and Clint Wallace (upcoming ‚ÄúEternals‚Äù), editor Bob Ducsay (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚Äù ‚ÄúStar Wars Episode VIII ‚Äì The Last Jedi‚Äù) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (‚ÄúRampage,‚Äù ‚ÄúWar for the Planet of the Apes‚Äù).  The music is by Kris Bowers (‚ÄúGreenbook,‚Äù Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúBridgerton‚Äù).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy.‚Äù  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia‚Äã‚Äã

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-‚Äã‚Äã...

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list‚Äã‚Äã...

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list‚Äã‚Äã...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram‚Äã‚Äã
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook‚Äã‚Äã
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial‚Äã‚Äã
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter‚Äã‚Äã
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube‚Äã‚Äã

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äã #FutureNostalgia‚Äã #Grammys
